message:
test(bench): add smoke report format parsing test

Add SmokeReport struct and smoke_report_format_parses test validating the
JSON schema for benchmarking smoke reports (git SHA, environment, seed,
system info). Also add a minor assertion to the existing
baseline_report_format_parses test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
